summary: Testing completed for User Creation and Student Wizard features. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: CreateUserWizard and AddStudentWizard both working correctly after fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed import error: AddStudentWizard was exported as default but imported as named export in SchoolDashboardContent.jsx
Fixed action ID mismatch: Quick action buttons used underscores (add_student) but switch cases used hyphens (add-student)
Fixed UserResponse model: Added default values for preferred_language and preferred_theme fields
Fixed StudentResponse model: Made student_number optional and added student_id field for wizard-created students
seed_data_creation: Created test users and students during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User creation and student wizard features are fully functional. CreateUserWizard accessible from /admin/users page. AddStudentWizard accessible from principal dashboard quick actions (طالب button). Both wizards have 5 steps and generate temporary passwords.

verified: Validates required fields (returns 422 for invalid data)
Successfully creates platform users with roles and permissions
Detects siblings when same parent phone/email used
Can search by phone, email, or national_id
Step 1: Role selection with 8 role options
Step 2: User data form (name, email, phone, region, city)
Step 3: Permissions selection based on role
Step 5: Success confirmation with copy credentials button
Wizard opens from principal dashboard quick action button
Step 1: Student data form (name, email, national_id, gender, DOB, education level, grade, class)

fixes_applied.issue: Import error - AddStudentWizard exported as default but imported as named
fixes_applied.fix: Changed import { AddStudentWizard } to import AddStudentWizard

fixes_applied.issue: Quick action buttons not triggering wizards due to action ID mismatch
fixes_applied.fix: Changed add_student to add-student, add_teacher to add-teacher, create_schedule to create-schedule, live_sessions to view-sessions, send_notification to send-notification

fixes_applied.issue: UserResponse model missing default values for preferred_language and preferred_theme
StudentResponse model required student_number but wizard creates student_id
fixes_applied.fix: Made student_number optional and added student_id field
